name: Culqi Peru Payment Gateway API
what_it_does: Culqi Peru payment gateway REST API for Peruvian businesses and developers to accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Diners Club, and digital wallets in Peruvian Sol (PEN) with developer-friendly API design and SBS-regulated compliance for modern Peru e-commerce. Enables AI agents to manage card payment charging for Peru e-commerce automation, handle card tokenization for PCI-compliant Peru checkout automation, access subscription and recurring payment for Peru subscription automation, retrieve payment status for Peru order confirmation automation, manage refund processing for Peru order management automation, handle webhook events for Peru payment lifecycle automation, access customer and card vault management for Peru recurring automation, retrieve transaction reporting for Peru financial reconciliation automation, manage anti-fraud protection for Peru payment security automation, and integrate Culqi with Peruvian e-commerce, fintech, and SaaS platforms for end-to-end Peru developer payment automation.
use_cases: Accepting Visa/Mastercard payments from Peru developer e-commerce agents
Creating card subscriptions from Peru SaaS recurring billing agents
Tokenizing cards for PCI-compliant from Peru recurring payment agents
Processing refunds from Peru order management automation agents
not_for: Pan-LatAm payments beyond Peru (use Kushki or EBANX for multi-country LatAm)
Enterprise Peru payments at scale (use Niubiz/VisaNet for enterprise acquiring)
Cash payments in Peru (Culqi is card-focused; use PagoEfectivo for cash)
best_when: A Peruvian startup or developer wanting AI agents to automate card payment acceptance, tokenization, and subscription billing through Culqi's developer-friendly Peru-native payment gateway.
avoid_when: SBS REGULATORY COMPLIANCE: Culqi operates under Superintendencia de Banca, Seguros y AFP (SBS) of Peru; automated payment operations must comply with SBS fintech regulations; automated payment without merchant SBS compliance creates regulatory risk. CHECKOUT TOKENIZATION BEFORE CHARGE: Culqi requires card tokenization via Culqi.js or hosted checkout before server-side charge; automated charge must use Culqi-generated token; automated direct card number charge without tokenization creates PCI scope expansion. PEN CURRENCY PRIMARILY: Culqi transactions are primarily in Peruvian Sol (PEN); automated pricing in foreign currency requires explicit currency parameter; automated USD amount without PEN conversion creates currency mismatch. API KEY SCOPING TEST vs LIVE: Culqi sandbox uses different API keys from live environment; automated environment management must maintain separate key sets; automated live key use in testing creates real charges from test scenarios.

auth.notes: Culqi uses public key (for tokenization) and secret key (for API) authentication. REST API with JSON. Lima, Peru HQ. Founded 2013 by Amparo Nalvarte and Danilo Cieza. Backed by Y Combinator, Credicorp, IFC. Products: Card processing, tokenization, subscriptions, refunds, anti-fraud. SDKs: PHP, Python, Node.js, Ruby, Java, .NET. PCI DSS. SBS regulated. Serves 5,000+ Peruvian merchants. Competes with Niubiz and MercadoPago for Peru payments.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — merchant registration with RUC required
pricing.paid_tiers: Card: 3.99% + S/0.30 per transaction; Amex: 4.99%; volume discounts available
pricing.notes: Lima PE. YC/Credicorp backed. Per-transaction fees in PEN. Peruvian RUC (tax ID) required.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per secret key; charge and reporting APIs throttled; webhooks for charge and refund events

known_agent_gotchas: TOKEN-THEN-CHARGE FLOW MANDATORY: Culqi requires Culqi.js tokenization before server-side charge; automated checkout must first obtain token via browser, then charge via server; automated server-side direct card charge without prior tokenization creates unsupported payment method error

CHARGE AMOUNT IN CENTAVOS: Culqi amounts are in centavos (smallest PEN unit, 1 PEN = 100 centavos); automated charge must multiply PEN amount by 100; automated decimal PEN amount creates amount mismatch (100x smaller than intended)

SUBSCRIPTION PLAN CREATION BEFORE SUBSCRIPTION: Culqi subscription requires existing Plan object; automated recurring billing must create Plan first, then Subscription; automated direct subscription creation without Plan creates plan not found error

EMAIL REQUIRED FOR CUSTOMER: Culqi Customer and Charge require valid email address; automated payment must collect customer email; automated payment without email creates validation error for required field

WEBHOOK SECRET FOR PAYLOAD VERIFICATION: Culqi webhooks include HMAC signature for authenticity; automated webhook endpoint must verify signature; automated unverified webhook creates spoofed charge event vulnerability
agent_readiness.security_notes: Peru payments. PCI-DSS, SBS-regulated. Public/Secret key. PE. Card and payment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Peru payments. PCI-DSS. Public/Secret key. PE. Card data.
